Quick Actions
🗺️ Take a Tour →
New here? Get a guided walkthrough of every feature in the app
📊 Go to Dashboard →
View real-time DPS, crit rates, and skill breakdowns as you play
🧪 Test a Build →
Record an encounter and save it with a build tag for later analysis
🏰 Build a Dungeon Run →
Combine multiple encounters into a full dungeon run with total stats
⚖️ Compare Saved Builds →
Side-by-side comparison of your saved encounters and builds
📜 Encounters →
Browse your combat history and review past encounters
📖 Guide →
Learn how to use the app and enable combat logging in-game
👥 Party DPS →
Share a party code with your group and see everyone's damage in real-time. Perfect for raids and dungeons!
📋 Setup Instructions
1
Open Throne and Liberty
Launch the game and log into your character
2
Open the Ring Menu
Press the Ring Menu key (default: ~) and look for Combat Log option
3
Enable Combat Logging
Toggle Combat Log to ON - logs will be saved automatically
4
Refresh This App
Click the button below to re-check for combat logs

📖 How to Use Build Comparison
1
Add Runs to Builds: Click the + button in each build column to assign saved encounters. You can add 3-5 runs per build to analyze consistency.
2
Review Build Averages: Each build shows individual run stats and calculates averages across all runs. The highest average in each category is highlighted.
3
Compare Peak Performance: Use the tabs on the left to analyze skill breakdown, timeline, and rotation details using the best run from each build.

⚙️ Advanced Skill Settings

Some skills in Throne and Liberty cannot critically hit or trigger heavy attacks. Including these skills in your crit/heavy rate calculations will skew your actual rates lower than they truly are.

How to use: Check "Cannot Crit" or "Cannot Heavy" for skills that are incapable of those hit types. These skills will be excluded from the rate calculations shown in the header.

⚠️ Important: Before marking a skill, make sure it truly cannot crit/heavy — not just that you had unlucky rolls! Test skills multiple times to confirm their behavior.

📖 Guide

ツCKヤ DPS Meter — StoopKid Beta — Combat log analyzer for Throne and Liberty.

⚡ Stats update after leaving combat (500ms refresh rate).

🔄 Reset Encounter before each pull for clean data.

⌨️ Global hotkey (default Ctrl+Tab) resets from anywhere.

📊 Build Testing uses first 60 seconds for standardized comparisons.

▶ 🚀 Getting Started

1. Enable Combat Logging in Throne and Liberty settings.

2. Launch the DPS Meter — it auto-detects your log folder.

3. Start combat — stats appear after you stop attacking.

4. Reset before each pull for accurate per-fight data.

💡 First time? Go to Settings to verify your log path is correct.
▶ 🏠 Dashboard

Your home screen with quick actions and lifetime statistics.

Quick Actions — Jump to Build Testing, Run Builder, Compare, or Guide.

Stats Cards — Build tests saved, dungeon runs, highest hit, best DPS.

Class Breakdown — Performance summary by class/weapon combo.

Recent Activity — Your latest saved tests and runs.

💡 Dashboard updates as you save more encounters and runs!
▶ 🎯 Build Testing

Comprehensive analysis tools for optimizing your build. Contains 4 sub-tabs:

📊 Summary — Performance overview with 1-Min DPS, damage breakdown, Top 5 Skills, and a piano roll timeline visualization.

⚔️ Skills — All skills used in first 60 seconds with damage bars, hits, crits, heavies, and percentages.

🎯 Weapon Stats — Pie chart breakdown by weapon type (requires Skill Assign setup).

📈 Rotation — DPS timeline, segment analysis (0-15s, 15-30s, 30-45s, 45-60s), gap detection, activity rate.

💡 All Build Testing data uses the first 60 seconds for fair, standardized comparisons.
▶ 💾 Saved

Save encounters with build tags (e.g., "GS/Dagger Burst").

Filter saved encounters by build name or sort by DPS.

Primary metric: 1-Min DPS for fair comparison.

Click any saved encounter to Load it and view full stats.

Data persists in encounters.json in the app folder.

▶ 📜 Encounters

Browse your complete combat history from the current session.

Auto-Detection — Encounters are automatically split based on target type and time gaps.

Timeline View — Shows all encounters chronologically with timestamps.

Color-Coded Categories:

👹 ArchbossRed — World bosses
🏰 RaidPurple — Raid encounters
🐉 Field BossOrange — Open-world bosses
⚔️ DungeonBlue — Dungeon bosses
💀 AddsGray — Trash mobs
📦 OtherGreen — Unassigned targets

Click any encounter to view detailed stats in the sub-tabs.

Sub-tabs — Summary, Skills, Weapons, and Rotation analysis.

💡 Assign targets in Target Assign tab for better automatic encounter categorization!
▶ 📊 Compare

Compare 2-4 saved encounters side-by-side.

Uses first 60 seconds for fair, standardized comparison.

Rankings with 🥇🥈🥉 medals — ties show 🤝.

Includes rotation charts, segment breakdowns, and skill timelines.

💡 Great for A/B testing different builds, gear, or skill rotations!
▶ 🏰 Run Builder

Build complete dungeon runs from your combat encounters.

Timeline View — Shows all detected encounters color-coded by category.

Drag encounters from the timeline into the Run Canvas.

Multi-select — Hold Ctrl/Cmd and click to select multiple encounters, then drag them all at once.

Auto-sort — Encounters automatically sort by timestamp.

Adds Grouping — Consecutive adds collapse into expandable groups.

Save Runs with hierarchical categorization:

Co-op DungeonDimensional Circle or Trial (with Tier 1-10)
RaidNormal / Difficult / Nightmare
Field BossNormal / Ascended
ArchbossNormal / Ascended
CustomAdd your own types and entries
💡 Assign targets first in Target Assign tab for better encounter detection!
▶ 📋 Run Summary

View saved runs organized by dungeon in a card-based layout.

Type Filters — Toggle Co-op, Raid, Field Boss, Archboss, or Custom runs.

Dungeon Cards — Each card groups all runs for a specific dungeon.

Card HeaderTotal runs, ⚔️ Boss damage, 💀 Adds damage
Tier/Mode SectionExpand to see runs grouped by tier or difficulty
Individual RunDate, name, boss/adds damage, duration
Timeline ViewExpand run to see boss/adds encounter breakdown
💡 Runs are automatically grouped by Type → Mode → Dungeon → Tier!
▶ ⚙️ Skill Settings

Mark skills that cannot crit or cannot heavy.

Header rates auto-adjust to exclude these skills for accurate percentages.

Auto-corrects if a skill later crits/heavies (removes the flag).

⚠️ Be careful! Only mark skills you've confirmed cannot crit/heavy — not just unlucky rolls.
▶ 🎯 Skill Assign

Assign skills to weapons for the Weapon Stats breakdown.

Weapon Cards — Large drop zones for each weapon type.

Drag skills from Unassigned to weapon cards.

Show Assigned — Click button to open modal and manage assigned skills.

Weapons: Greatsword, Sword & Shield, Dagger, Spear, Crossbow, Longbow, Staff, Wand, Orb.

Mastery/Other — For passive skills or weapon-neutral abilities.

💡 Assignments persist in weapon_config.json across sessions!
▶ 🎯 Target Assign

Categorize targets for smart encounter detection and Run Builder.

Drag targets from Unassigned to category cards:

👹 ArchbossAll hits same day (no time gap limit)
🏰 Raid Boss1-2 minute gaps between encounters
🐉 Field Boss1-2 minute gaps (warns on 60-90s gaps)
⚔️ Dungeon BossAssign to specific dungeon for auto-detection
💀 Dungeon AddsAssign adds to specific dungeon (optional)
💀 AddsAll grouped together (trash mobs)
📦 Other30 second gaps (default)

Dungeon Assignment: When dropping on Dungeon Boss or Dungeon Adds, select which dungeon the target belongs to.

Click "Show Assigned" on any category to manage or unassign targets.

💡 Dungeon assignments enable auto-detection of runs in Run Builder!
▶ 📋 Log File

View the raw combat log from your current game session.

Independent of encounters — not affected by Reset or Load.

Filter by skill name, target, crits only, or heavies only.

Sort by clicking column headers.

Export to CSV for external analysis.

▶ 👥 Party DPS

Share DPS with your group in real-time using party codes.

Set Username — Choose a display name (required before creating/joining).

Create Party — Generate a 4-letter code to share with your group.

Join Party — Enter a party code to join an existing party.

Party Features:

📊 Live ResultsSee everyone's damage updated in real-time
🟢 Online StatusGreen/gray dots show who's connected
⏱️ Party ExpirationParties auto-delete after 12 hours
▶ Start/EndLeader controls encounter recording
🎯 Target FilterFilter results by specific boss/target
🔄 SyncLeader can force-refresh all members' data
🗑️ Clear ResultsLeader clears results for everyone

Diagnostics Panel — Expand to troubleshoot connection issues.

💡 If you disconnect, rejoin with the same party code — you'll keep leadership if you were the leader!
▶ 🎮 Controls & Buttons
Reset EncounterClears all stats, ignores buffered data
Save EncounterSave with build tag for comparison
Load EncounterView a saved encounter's stats
Purge LogFileClear log (disable game logging first!)
SettingsConfigure log path, player filter, hotkey
GuideYou're reading it! 📖
💡 When viewing a loaded encounter, a blue banner appears. Click "Return to Live" to go back.
▶ ⚙️ Custom Dungeon Management

In Run Builder, select "Custom / Manage" from the Type dropdown to:

➕ Add New Type — Create custom top-level categories (e.g., "Guild Boss").

➕ Add Entry — Add dungeons/bosses to existing categories.

🗑️ Delete — Remove entries or entire custom types.

Custom entries are saved to dungeons.json and appear in dropdowns.

▶ 💡 Pro Tips
💡 Reset before each boss pull for clean, accurate data.
💡 Assign targets FIRST — it makes Run Builder encounter detection much better!
💡 Use Ctrl+Click to multi-select encounters in Run Builder timeline.
💡 Check the Rotation tab to identify gaps in your damage uptime.
💡 Use Skill Settings if DoTs or summons skew your crit rate.
💡 Compare builds using saved encounters — the 60s window standardizes comparisons.
▶ 📝 Changelog
StoopKid Beta 2026
  • NEW Run Lab — Compare two runs side-by-side with skill matrix, cast drilldown, and interval analysis
  • NEW Session Queue — Auto-queue completed runs, tag inline, bulk-save at end of session
  • NEW A/B slot assignment — Assign any two queued runs to Run Lab with one click
  • NEW Stacked DPS Timeline — Per-skill color breakdown in the Rotation chart with real Y-axis values
  • NEW Interactive Tour — Step-by-step walkthrough of the app with demo data
  • IMPROVED Performance Analysis — 9 skill-aware insights including weak window cause, dropped cast detection, consistency score
  • IMPROVED Hit type tracking — Crit%, Heavy%, and Crit+Heavy% shown everywhere including per-skill in Run Lab
  • IMPROVED Run Lab Key Findings — surfaces top causes of DPS difference with estimated damage impact
  • IMPROVED Session Queue shows individual ✕ remove per run
v1.0 (base) December 2024 — SirPHz
  • Build Testing tab with Summary, Skills, Weapons, Rotation sub-tabs
  • Run Builder for tracking dungeon runs
  • Compare tab for side-by-side build comparison
  • Class selection, grouping by class in Saved list
  • Party DPS (beta) — post-combat boss scoreboard on an owned Cloudflare relay
  • Target assignment system, custom dungeon definitions
  • Piano roll timeline, gap detection, rotation analysis
  • Global hotkey support (Ctrl+Tab)

Built on top of the original CK DPS Meter by SirPHz. Continued and extended by the guild.
